---
title: "References & Citations"
subtitle: "Dataset, metric, backbones, and methods — with the license obligations"
toc: true
---

## Dataset {#dataset}

::: {.callout-important}
## Cite both, per the CC BY-NC 4.0 license
The SLICE-3D dataset is licensed **CC BY-NC 4.0** (non-commercial, attribution required). If you
use it, you must cite **both** the dataset paper and the challenge release.
:::

- **SLICE-3D dataset** — Kurtansky, N. R. et al. *The SLICE-3D dataset: 400,000 skin lesion image
  crops extracted from 3D TBP for skin cancer detection.* **Scientific Data** (2024).
  [doi:10.1038/s41597-024-03743-w](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-024-03743-w) [@kurtansky2024slice3d]
- **Challenge release** — International Skin Imaging Collaboration. *SLICE-3D 2024 Challenge
  Dataset.* [doi:10.34970/2024-slice-3d](https://doi.org/10.34970/2024-slice-3d), **CC BY-NC 4.0**
  [@isic2024challenge]
- **Challenge recap** — Kurtansky, N. R. et al. *Automated triage of cancer-suspicious skin
  lesions with 3D total-body photography.* **npj Digital Medicine** (2025). PMC12639164.
  Establishes the intra-patient-context result we deliberately do **not** use external data to
  beat — useful framing for the no-external-data scope [@kurtansky2025npj].

## Metric

- **Official ISIC-2024 scorer** — ISIC Research / Kurtansky (MSKCC). Partial AUC above **80%**
  TPR; scores in `[0, 0.20]`.
  [github.com/ISIC-Research/Challenge-2024-Metrics](https://github.com/ISIC-Research/Challenge-2024-Metrics)
  [@isicmetric2024]. *Note:* the repo README states 88% (`[0, 0.12]`); the live leaderboard used
  **80%** — we pin 80%.

## Gradient-boosted decision trees

- **LightGBM** — Ke, G. et al. NeurIPS (2017) [@ke2017lightgbm].
- **CatBoost** — Prokhorenkova, L. et al. NeurIPS (2018) [@prokhorenkova2018catboost].
- **XGBoost** — Chen, T. & Guestrin, C. KDD (2016) [@chen2016xgboost].

## Image backbones (the frontier sweep)

- **ConvNeXt-V2 + FCMAE** — Woo, S. et al. (2023) [@woo2023convnextv2] — our protagonist
  (`convnextv2_nano`, MAE self-supervised init then in22k→in1k fine-tune).
- **ViT / AugReg** — Dosovitskiy, A. et al. ICLR (2021) [@dosovitskiy2021vit]; Steiner, A. et al.
  (2021) [@steiner2021augreg].
- **EVA-02** — Fang, Y. et al. (2023) [@fang2023eva02].
- **MobileNetV4** — Qin, D. et al. (2024) [@qin2024mobilenetv4].
- **MobileNetV5 / Gemma-3n encoder** — Google / Wightman (2025) [@google2025mobilenetv5] — the
  heavy anchor of the frontier (~300 M params).
- **Swin Transformer V2** — Liu, Z. et al. CVPR (2022) [@liu2022swinv2].
- **EfficientViT** — Cai, H. et al. CVPR (2023) [@cai2023efficientvit].
- **timm (PyTorch Image Models)** — Wightman, R. (2019) [@wightman2019timm] — source of the
  backbones and the RTX-class inference-timing benchmarks for the latency axis.

## Imbalance & (partial) AUC optimization

- **Focal loss** — Lin, T.-Y. et al. ICCV (2017) [@lin2017focal].
- **Deep AUC Maximization** — Yuan, Z. et al. ICCV (2021) [@yuan2021dam].
- **Stochastic AUC max with DNNs** — Liu, M. et al. (2019) [@liu2019stochasticauc].
- **AUC consistency** — Gao, W. & Zhou, Z.-H. (2012) [@gao2012auc].

## Self-supervised learning (the "one-up" rationale)

- **MAE** — He, K. et al. CVPR (2022) [@he2022mae].
- **DINOv2** — Oquab, M. et al. TMLR (2024) [@oquab2024dinov2].

These motivate the principled future-work direction: self-supervised pretraining on the 400k+
**unlabeled** SLICE-3D crops, as the in-constraint substitute for the external data we banned.

## Related ISIC-2024 solutions (positioning)

- Hasan, M. Z. & Rifat, F. Y. *Hybrid Ensemble of Segmentation-Assisted Classification and GBDT.*
  arXiv:2506.03420 (2025) [@hasan2025hybrid] — image + GBDT + **synthetic** augmentation,
  explicitly the approach we reject; a clean contrast for the no-synthetic-data argument.

## Cite this work {#cite-this-work}

Please cite the repository (`CITATION.cff` renders a "Cite this repository" button on GitHub) and
**also** the SLICE-3D dataset above.

```bibtex
@software{pakistanai_isic2024,
  title   = {ISIC-2024 SLICE-3D: an efficiency-frontier, single-dataset,
             no-external-data baseline (Pakistan.AI)},
  author  = {Raja, Muhammad Junaid Ali Asif and Sultan, Adil and Hassan, Shahzaib Ahmed},
  year    = {2026},
  url     = {https://github.com/junaidaliop/isic2024-tbp},
  note    = {Neural Networks course project, CSIE, NYUST}
}
```

## Full bibliography

::: {#refs}
:::
